instruction: Two subtle issues on the clipboard icon: the gray watermark square is the wrong shade (near-white) AND it has drifted slightly (~3px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/clipboard.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"/><rect x="8" y="2" width="8" height="4" rx="1" ry="1"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#fcfcfc" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="11" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/clipboard.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"/><rect x="8" y="2" width="8" height="4" rx="1" ry="1"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#9ca3af" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
